name: Beefy Spaghetti Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, combine the ground beef, onion, garlic, and olive oil.
2. Microwave on high until the meat is no longer pink, stirring once during cooking.
3. Drain any excess fat from the meat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: green beans, mushrooms, bay leaf, tomato sauce, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover the dish and microwave on high until the spaghetti is cooked through (about 20 to 25 minutes), stirring occasionally.
